Power of Fire
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: NONE
Race: NONE

Item Type:Misc
Light:Fire Beetle Eye
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Fleven
Lucy Entry By:Agamenoar
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-11 05:31:02
Page Updated:Sun Aug 3rd, 2025

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 25
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Solusek's Eye (Solusek A)
NPC Name
blazing elemental
lava elemental

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Lake Rathetear
Quest Name
Magician Epic: Orb of Mastery

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Solusek's Eye (Solusek A)


Uploaded September 13th, 2022 by Drewinette
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 3 Next »
Post Comment
The year is 2025...and im doing this camp.
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2025 at 2:33 PM Rating: Decent
LordClassic
Scholar
36 posts
Im bored so did some maths based on my findings and data on the interwebs.

A 5.75% (lava elemental) chance to get it every 17 minutes is almost 1.7× better than 2% (blazing elemental) to get it every 10 minutes, from a per minute of farming.


At level 51 (Fangbreaker lockout)

lava elemental = more active. Need to kill the adds in the room. The spawn is a roamer so can get away from you if not alert. But for almost double the chance.

blazing elemental = total afk farm. Can just fully afk other than to check for loot But for almost half the chance. Almost twice as long.

Probability = 11.36% per hour vs 18.03% per hour
OR
2% every 10 min -- 50% in 5.72h, 80% in 13.28h
5.75% every 17 min -- 50% in 3.33h, 80% in 7.72h


Very interesting balance. Not by design as much of EQ is... or was it??

Edited, Aug 1st 2025 3:37pm by LordClassic

Edited, Aug 1st 2025 3:38pm by LordClassic
▲ Page top
The year is 2025...and im doing this camp.
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2025 at 7:27 PM Rating: Decent
Lothoec
12 posts
Lava Elemental being a named has a PH so won't spawn each time. You could get incredibly unlucky and not see him for multiple spawns, skewing your percentages. If you want the highest chance for success, do both sets of elementals in SolA.
▲ Page top
My brain is melting
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2022 at 12:42 PM Rating: Decent
opler
3 posts
10 placeholders later, still not a single popup from this lava elemental. I've been running back and forth for hours on end, at least let the guy pop for me. At this point, I'd rather farm Quillmane than put up with this garbage.
▲ Page top
Rizlona Kunark TLP
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2020 at 9:31 AM Rating: Excellent
justinrx8
Scholar
41 posts
I recently had the distinct pleasure of farming 5 of these for my group.

Here are some notes regarding the camp:
  • I camped both areas simultaneously with my team. I would recommend you have at least one other person or account to help you camp this, so you can avoid having to run between the camps and risk losing your current spot.
  • I began my camp at roughly 11am Sunday, and looted my fifth piece at 10:30am the following Monday.
  • The first 3 Powers dropped from the blazing elementals, the first dropped at roughly 6:45pm, the next one was a couple spawns later, and then the third did not drop until 1am the following morning. I camped out to sleep after getting the third power, and started again at 6am that day, with the final 2 powers dropping from the lava elemental on back to back spawns 4.5 hours later.
  • The lava elemental only spawned 7 times total during this camping expedition. So, while you may see a higher drop rate from the lava elemental, you may actually get more powers from the blazings just due to the higher number of guaranteed spawns.
  • At the lava elemental camp, I positioned my mages at the north and south end of the room, parallel with the pillars so they would only aggro the PH or elemental when spawned, and not the static spawns. Useful to know if you are studying and letting your pet handle the spawns.
  • As mentioned above, this is a great camp if you have something to study or read while you pass the time.
▲ Page top
Lava elemental
QuoteReply
# Jul 07 2020 at 10:01 PM Rating: Good
DoctaJay
Sage
90 posts
Camped both blazing and lava elementals at the same on 2 characters, checking every 20 minutes. The lava elemental dropped it after the 5th spawn (3 named, 2 PH). The PH is the roaming clockwork (CWG Model__) in the room with the pillars, you do not need to kill the static one.

I killed the blazing elementals an equal amount of times and they did not drop it.

I camped the blazing elementals for about a week, 5 to 8 hours per day, crappy loot, and no luck. Found my way to the miner room, killed the ph and in about 15 minutes lava elemental popped, dropped the PoF first time, yay

The pit
QuoteReply
# Feb 01 2014 at 3:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1613953066801
6 posts
Near the spears that cross the walk way like a trap from Indiana Jones is a pit you can fall into...go down there and camp, Efreeti is down there but the elementals will spawn around you. I just parked me and my pet there and killed them as they came up. 30 minutes, 8 kills and I was done.

Ok... 6.5 hrs of camping the blazing elementals, 20 kills @ 15 min spawn for 1st one then 3 mins spawn for 2nd one after 1st one dies then 3rd one is random spawn from there. A total of 20 kills and finally the Power of Fire dropped! Guess I was lucky!

I would say it was a rare drop.

BTW my ranger never did see one lava elemental on track and she killed lots of ph for them so.... /shurg

Lava Elemental Place Holder
QuoteReply
# Dec 26 2009 at 3:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595176320886
14 posts
Just to let you guys know, speed up the process of the Lava Elemental in the secret pillar room -135 . -925 has a gnomerobot place holder. The roaming CWG Model MC in that room is the roaming Lava Elemental placeholder. Also if you attack the Lava Elemental anygnome or cog bot will add on.

Hope this helps

Zhang Sanfeng
Lv 47 Mage -Zek-

A true warrior is always armed with three things: the radiant sword of pacification; the mirror of bravery, wisdom, and friendship; and the precious jewel of enlightenment.
Aikido is the principle of non-resistance. Because it is non-resistant, it is victorious from the beginning. Those with evil intentions or contentious thoughts are instantly vanquished. Aikido is invincible because it contends with nothing.

# Mar 29 2009 at 7:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1705277777841
Scholar
63 posts
Place the following two labels into your soldunga_2.txt map

P 977.2390, 125.4114, 47.1270, 0, 0, 0, 3, lava_elemental_PH_wandering_Clockwork__---125___----977___50

P 734.7802, 65.9146, 22.1582, 0, 0, 0, 3, Blazing_Elementals_---65___---734___24


20min respawn timer

and as a side note quest is almost 10years old and NOONE ever posted labels /boggle
